About me

I'm a Creative Director and UI/UX Designer based in Bangalore, India, with a strong background as a MERN Stack Developer. I specialize in crafting seamless digital experiences that combine functionality with striking visuals.

My mission is to build websites that are not only highly functional and user-friendly but also aesthetically captivating. I infuse a unique personal touch into each project, ensuring that the final product is both engaging and intuitive. My ultimate goal is to effectively communicate your message and identity through innovative design and robust development, creating memorable experiences for users.

What I'm doing

  • Web design

    The most modern and high-quality design made at a professional level.

  • Web development

    High-quality development of sites at the professional level.

  • Mobile apps

    Professional development of applications for iOS and Android.

  • Photography

    I make high-quality photos of any category at a professional level.

Resume

Education

  1. Rajeev Institute of Technology

    2020 — 2024

    I hold a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering, having graduated with a CGPA of 7.4. My academic journey equipped me with a solid foundation in both theoretical and practical aspects of computer science, enabling me to tackle complex problems with innovative solutions. This academic background has honed my analytical and technical skills, preparing me to excel in the dynamic field of web development and UI/UX design.

  2. BGS VS PU College

    2006 — 2007

    I completed my pre-university education with a focus on PCMS (Physics, Mathematics, Computer Science, and Chemistry), achieving a percentage of 73%. This diverse and rigorous academic background provided me with a strong foundation in analytical thinking, problem-solving, and technical skills. These subjects have been instrumental in shaping my logical and methodical approach to complex challenges, further fueling my passion for technology and design.
